settings.title: Monster Piercing | Silver Nose Rings
settings.text:
Shine with effortless elegance in our Silver Nose Rings Collection, featuring a stunning variety of hoops, clickers, and studs crafted for style, comfort, and everyday wear. Made from premium sterling silver and high-quality surgical steel, each piece is designed to offer a smooth fit, lasting shine, and modern sophistication.

Discover classic seamless hoops, secure clickers, and beautifully detailed studs including L bend, screw, bone end, and straight styles. With choices ranging from simple silver finishes to sparkling cubic zirconia, pavé, and beaded designs, this collection lets you create a look that’s uniquely yours.

Perfect for anyone who loves dainty, minimalist jewellery, our silver nose rings blend refined craftsmanship with trend-led design, the ideal choice for everyday wear or special occasions.

settings.question: How do I choose the right style –screw, L-bend, bone, or straight?
settings.answer:
• Screw studs twist securely into the piercing for a snug fit.
  • L-bends are shaped for easy insertion and comfortable daily wear.
  • Bone ends have a small ball tip that holds the stud in place.
  • Straight studs are best for piercers or custom bends.

The best choice depends on your comfort and your piercer’s recommendation.

settings.question: What size nose stud should I choose?
settings.answer: Most nose studs are 18G (1.0mm) or 20G (0.8mm). The stone size typically ranges between 1.5mm and 3mm. If you’re unsure, check with your piercer for your exact gauge and preferred gem size.

settings.question: What type of silver do you use for your nose studs?
settings.answer: All our silver nose studs are made from genuine 925 sterling silver, never plated or mixed with base metals. Each piece is polished to a smooth finish for lasting shine, comfort and durability.

settings.question: Can I wear sterling silver nose studs every day?
settings.answer: Yes – sterling silver is suitable for everyday wear. However, to keep your jewellery bright, we recommend removing it before swimming, showering, or using skincare products, as silver can tarnish over time when exposed to moisture and chemicals.
